name: Caramel Banana Chocolate Chip Ice Cream Par
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the bananas.
2. Using a slotted spoon, smash them to a rough-textured consistency in a stainless steel bowl. Cover with film wrap and set aside.
3. In a 2-1/2-quart saucepan, combine 1/2 cup sugar and lemon juice. Stir with a whisk until combined (the sugar will resemble moist sand).
4. Caramelize the sugar over medium-high heat for 5 to 6 minutes, stirring constantly with a whisk to break up any lumps (the sugar will first turn clear as it liquefies, then light brown as it caramelizes).
5. Reduce the heat to medium.
6. Carefully and slowly pour in the heavy cream, then the half-and-half into the caramelized sugar (the mixture will steam and boil rapidly as the cream is added). Add 1/2 cup sugar and whisk to dissolve. Bring to a boil for about 5 minutes.
